description:
🕒 10:30–15:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ohk-hannoalps3/

This tour has been closed to new registrations due to organizer circumstances.

This tour traverses the spine of the so-called Hanno Alps—the ridge running from Izugatake to Tenranzan—over four separate outings. Part 3 covers the segment from Agano Station, running through representative peaks of the Hanno Alps including Maesaka, Ōtakayama, and Tenkakuyama. Lunch will be a special bento prepared by Taira Kuri-en (a local orchard).

【Fee】 ¥7,800 per person (includes guide fee, lunch, and insurance)

【Capacity】 10 people

【Guide】 Akira Shimizu, Mountain Guide Stage II certified by the Japan Mountain Guides Association

【What to bring】 Gloves, drinking water, hat, rain gear, snacks, towel
location: 集合 西武池袋線・秩父線「吾野駅」駅前広場
summary: 📍 Hanno Alps Full Traverse with Mountain Guide, Part 3 (Agano Station to Maesaka, Ōtakayama, Tenkakuyama, and Higashi-Agano Station) — RECRUITMENT CLOSED
